---
title: "Instructor Only: Outliers And Summaries Practice"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
---

```{r}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("../../../.."))
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
```

# Worked Reference

```{r}
davis <- read_csv("data/real/davis_height_weight.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

davis |>
  filter(!is.na(weight_reporting_error_kg)) |>
  summarize(
    n = n(),
    mean_error = mean(weight_reporting_error_kg),
    median_error = median(weight_reporting_error_kg),
    min_error = min(weight_reporting_error_kg),
    max_error = max(weight_reporting_error_kg),
    iqr_error = IQR(weight_reporting_error_kg)
  )

ggplot(davis, aes(x = weight_reporting_error_kg)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Measured Minus Reported Weight",
    x = "Weight reporting error (kg)",
    y = "Number of people"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
